productName: Smokiez Sour Dreamy Blueberry Trifecta 100mg THC:CBG:CBN 1:1:1 Fruit Chews
description: A mouth-watering sweet, ripe blueberry chew inspired by handmade market candies — juicy, tangy, and soft enough to feel fresh from the candy kitchen. It blends THC for a classic euphoric lift, CBG to support daytime focus and clarity, and CBN to help you relax and ease into rest in a 1:1:1 ratio. Perfect for winding down at the end of the day.
